inputs.label: Maximum Signal Frequency
inputs.businessContext: The highest frequency component expected in the signal to be sampled or analyzed.

businessContext_i18n.en: The highest frequency component expected in the signal to be sampled or analyzed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örneklenen veya analiz edilen sinyalde beklenen en yüksek frekans bileşeni.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die höchste Frequenzkomponente, die im zu erfassenden oder analysierenden Signal erwartet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La composante de fréquence la plus élevée attendue dans le signal à échantillonner ou analyser.
businessContext_i18n.es: El componente de frecuencia más alto esperado en la señal a muestrear o analizar.

inputs.label: Sampling Frequency
inputs.businessContext: The rate at which the data acquisition system samples the signal.

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate at which the data acquisition system samples the signal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veri toplama sisteminin sinyali örnekleme hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Rate, mit der das Datenerfassungssystem das Signal abtastet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La vitesse à laquelle le système d'acquisition de données échantillonne le signal.
businessContext_i18n.es: La velocidad a la que el sistema de adquisición de datos muestrea la señal.

inputs.label: Safety Margin Factor
inputs.businessContext: Engineering safety factor to provide a margin against aliasing; typically 1.2 to 2.0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Engineering safety factor to provide a margin against aliasing; typically 1.2 to 2.0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örtüşmeye karşı marj sağlayan mühendislik güvenlik faktörü; tipik olarak 1,2 ila 2,0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Technischer Sicherheitsfaktor zur Bereitstellung einer Marge gegen Aliasing; typischerweise 1,2 bis 2,0.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de sécurité technique pour fournir une marge contre le repliement ; généralement de 1,2 à 2,0.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de seguridad de ingeniería para proporcionar un margen contra el aliasing; típicamente 1.2 a 2.0.

inputs.label: Desired Nyquist Utilization
inputs.businessContext: The target percentage of the Nyquist frequency that the maximum signal frequency should occupy for optimal setup.

businessContext_i18n.en: The target percentage of the Nyquist frequency that the maximum signal frequency should occupy for optimal setup.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Optimum kurulum için maksimum sinyal frekansının Nyquist frekansının yüzde kaçını kaplaması gerektiğini gösteren hedef yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der angestrebte Prozentsatz der Nyquist-Frequenz, den die maximale Signalfrequenz für eine optimale Konfiguration belegen soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le pourcentage cible de la fréquence de Nyquist que la fréquence maximale du signal doit occuper pour une configuration optimale.
businessContext_i18n.es: El porcentaje objetivo de la frecuencia de Nyquist que debe ocupar la frecuencia máxima de la señal para una configuración óptima.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
